articles.title: Hardline Pivot: Trump Demands Stricter Terms in Revised Draft to End Iran War - Kyiv Post
articles.snippet: US President Donald Trump has tightened the conditions for a potential agreement to end the active phase of the war with Iran, sending a revised draft of the document to Tehran.
